supporting_evidence: Reporter states surrounding card positions animate while the focused card border snaps, so some animation pipeline components are active.
contradicting_evidence: state.applyUpdate logs (seq=19,30,40) show committed expanded/editing transitions for the same item ID rather than a missing promotion event.
For collapse/edit transitions, animation.schedule -> animation.start -> animation.batch.begin/end -> animation.complete all execute for affected ID E9905B91-621C-4DA3-AF30-EF8E0EE9C6B0.
table.before/during/afterHeightAnimation runs with stable visibleMap including downstream card movement, matching report that list positions animate while border interpolation fails.
missing_evidence: Whether the row bottom-border parameter is actually animatable/interpolated across collapse/edit state changes.
Whether row view identity is being recreated at the transition boundary, forcing a snap redraw of border geometry.
candidates.next_discriminating_check: Capture per-frame bottom-border geometry/progress for item E9905B91-621C-4DA3-AF30-EF8E0EE9C6B0 during collapse while animation.batch is active; intermediate values falsify the render-snap hypothesis, a direct jump confirms it.
